response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical breadth across languages and systems, and a proven track record in building scalable platforms and open-source tools, but lacks explicit evidence of experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, or AI-driven growth systems at enterprise scale — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems and high-throughput services (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Strong open-source contributions and tooling expertise (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
Proven ability to lead cross-functional work and mentor others via workshops and CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: No clear evidence of building or leading experimentation, feature flighting, or guardrail systems
Limited mention of telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis in growth contexts
Experience with AI tools is implied (AI-agent infrastructure) but not demonstrated as impactful or scalable
